productDisplayName: Vans Men Authentic White Casual Shoes
description: vans brings you the shoe that started it all - the Authentic. Inspired by skate board culture, Authentic is a favourite among hardcore skaters and skate enthusiasts. Team these with jeans and graphic tees. Uppers Canvas uppers for durability and comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand tab on the forefoot seam and brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or use a brush to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
